Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

December 21st 2012

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2009-11-02 · 3 answers
...is there a Vedic explaination for 2012,do you think anything at all will happen ?
user [198] · 2009-11-02
The world is sitting on a pile of nuclear weapons, Any day can be dec.21,2012. It can be tommorrow, it can be after a month. It can be 2012. Why to specify a particular date and be traumatised. Chant the holy name intensely as much as we can. Those devotees who have the ability can try to preach the message of Krsna consciousness to the world leaders, what else we can do. Krsna is the controller.
user [418] · 2009-12-15
Hare Krishna! All glories to Srila Prabhupada.
I heard that Srila Prabhupada said the hot climates would become cold and the cold climates would become hot. I tried to find reference online but no success. There was no time frame given that i know of. Some wonderful discussions about WW3 etc., were edited by leaders, they thought the public could not handle the truth. And some "Prabhupada saids" did originate from others. During His manifest transcendental pastimes, we only thought about Him and focused on Him-we did not hear from others much. We can still do that today. He left everything behind for us. "He reasons ill who tells that Vaisnavas die for thou art living still in sound! The Vaisnavas die to live and living try to spread the Holy Name around." Srila Bhaktivinode Thakura.

Hare Krishna
user [433] · 2009-12-15
were edited by leaders, they thought the public could not handle the truth

So in other words you have no proof of this? Were you there at the time? Do you have testimony of someone who was?

Not a challenge, just an inquiry.
